title: CastleEdit
description: Generate castles in minutes according to your preferences
body:
This datapack allows you to place different part of a castle where you wish to (walls, towers, ground, etc, in different rotation including diagonal ones), using different wands, with the possibility to undo the placed parts (it won't undo the terrain modification like grass removal though).

This datapack is really useful for building in the overworld generation whilst matching the terrain easily.

Run 
```
/function castleedit:wands
```
to get castle editing wands.

The way to use each wands is written in its description

![Player right clicking with one of the wand to place a tower](https://i.imgur.com/KWsF8ff.gif)

![Player right clicking with one of the wand to place a wall](https://i.imgur.com/5refgj6.gif)
